endpoints.name: GET /v2/Attempts
endpoints.description: List all the verification attempts for a given Account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Attempts/Summary
endpoints.description: Get a summary of how many attempts were made and how many were converted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Attempts/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific verification attempt.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Forms/{FormType}
endpoints.description: Fetch the forms for a specific Form Type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FORMTYPE}} with a real formtype.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/SafeList/Numbers
endpoints.description: Add a new phone number to SafeList.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/SafeList/Numbers/{PhoneNumber}
endpoints.description: Check if a phone number exists in SafeList.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{PHONENUMBER}} with a real phonenumber.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/SafeList/Numbers/{PhoneNumber}
endpoints.description: Remove a phone number from SafeList.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{PHONENUMBER}} with a real phonenumber.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Services
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Verification Services for an account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/Services
endpoints.description: Create a new Verification Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/AccessTokens
endpoints.description: Create a new enrollment Access Token for the Entity
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/AccessTokens/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch an Access Token for the Entity
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Entities for a Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities
endpoints.description: Create a new Entity for the Service
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Entity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Entity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}/Challenges
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Challenges for a Factor.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}/Challenges
endpoints.description: Create a new Challenge for the Factor
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}/Challenges/{ChallengeSid}/Notifications
endpoints.description: Create a new Notification for the corresponding Challenge
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{CHALLENGESID}} with a real challengesid. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}/Challenges/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Challenge.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}/Challenges/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Verify a specific Challenge.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}/Factors
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Factors for an Entity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}/Factors
endpoints.description: Create a new Factor for the Entity
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}/Factors/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch a specific Factor.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}/Factors/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update a specific Factor. This endpoint can be used to Verify a Factor if passed an `AuthPayload` param.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v2/Services/{ServiceSid}/Entities/{Identity}/Factors/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Factor.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{IDENTITY}} with a real identity. Replace {{SERVICESID}} with a real servicesid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.
